mise-tasks/lint/gofmt:1-15
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Lint gofmt"
  3| 
  4| # List of non-formatted files:
  5| files="$(gofmt -l -s .)"
  6| 
  7| # Is that list empty?  If not exit nonzero and say which files are unformatted:
  8| if [ -n "$files" ]; then
  9|   echo "These .go files need to be formatted:"
  10|   echo ""
  11|   echo "$files"
  12|   echo ""
  13|   echo "To fix: mise run fmt"
  14|   exit 1
  15| fi

mise-tasks/lint/gomod:1-12
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="go mod tidy"
  3| 
  4| go mod tidy
  5| 
  6| # Check and fail if there are differences with committed files:
  7| status="$(git status --porcelain=v1 go.mod go.sum 2>/dev/null)"
  8| if [ "$status" != "" ]; then
  9|   echo "go module files modified, please commit result of 'go mod tidy'!"
  10|   echo "$status"
  11|   exit 1
  12| fi

mise-tasks/lint/shellcheck:1-4
  1| #!/bin/sh
  2| #MISE description="Lint shell scripts with shellcheck"
  3| 
  4| find mise-tasks -type f -exec sh -c 'head -1 "$1" | grep -q "^#!/bin/sh\|^#!/bin/bash"' _ {} \; -print0 | xargs -0 shellcheck
